description: Style NoteGo for a look that is bold and beautiful with this handmade necklace from adrika. Its stylish design adds a touch of glamour to your wardrobe. Pair it with any outfit for a look that is ethnic yet modern.Product DetailsSingle strand necklace with brown and beige beads on beige threadMaterial and CareGlass and beadsin a cotton cordWipe with soft cloth to maintain shine and keep away dust and dirtSizeLength of necklace: 85 cm
